title: The Vineyard Victim
openingIncident: At 8:55 pm, Clementine Fraser, wine merchant, was found dead in the dimly lit dining room. Three people had been present during the final minutes, and each gave a different account. Nothing outside the room is needed to identify the killer.

suspects.name: Astrid Blackwood
suspects.statement: At 8:45 pm, Piper Redding helped me set the glass down on the side table. We left the room together immediately afterwards. Elijah Patel and Clementine Fraser were still inside.
suspects.alibiClaim: Piper Redding and I were together outside the room from 8:45 pm until the discovery at 8:55 pm.

suspects.name: Elijah Patel
suspects.statement: I left at 8:40 pm. I never touched the knife and did not go near the bottle.
suspects.alibiClaim: I had already left the room by 8:40 pm and did not return.

suspects.name: Piper Redding
suspects.statement: At 8:45 pm, I helped Astrid Blackwood set the glass down on the side table. We then left together and remained together until the body was found at 8:55 pm.
suspects.alibiClaim: Astrid Blackwood and I were together outside the room from 8:45 pm until the discovery at 8:55 pm.

clues.title: The Edge of Knife
clues.detail: A fresh line of blood runs along one edge of the knife, and its point has a new bend. Clementine Fraser has a narrow wound consistent with that edge.

clues.title: Ring beneath Glass
clues.detail: The fresh circular ring beneath the glass is crossed by a narrow blood droplet from the attack whose edge remains unbroken. Astrid Blackwood and Piper Redding both state that they set the glass down on the side table at 8:45 pm before leaving together.

clues.title: Fibres on Knife
clues.detail: Fine copper-coloured silk threads are caught around the handle of the knife. Elijah Patel's copper silk pocket square has a fresh narrow tear, exposing the same alternating copper and navy stripe.

clues.title: Fragment at Bottle
clues.detail: A curved black lacquer chip edged in gold is lodged inside the handle joint of the bottle on top of a narrow blood droplet from the attack. The black-and-gold fountain-pen cap worn by Elijah Patel has a fresh curved gap in the lacquer; the exposed edges visibly fit the fragment.

clues.title: Crack in Plate
clues.detail: A crack runs across the plate. A continuous yellowed glue line is visible deep inside the break.

solution.motive: Elijah Patel killed Clementine Fraser because a long-buried family secret regarding the vineyard's true ownership because.
solution.method: Clementine Fraser was fatally stabbed with the knife.
solution.timeOfDeath: After 8:45 pm and before discovery at 8:55 pm
solution.opportunity: Elijah Patel claimed to have left at 8:40 pm. The timeline evidence places the attack after Astrid Blackwood and Piper Redding left together at 8:45 pm; the fine copper-coloured silk threads on the knife and the black and gold fragment recovered from the bottle place Elijah Patel inside afterwards. Elijah Patel therefore had the only evidenced opportunity to be alone with Clementine Fraser and reach the knife during the murder window.
